name: mcp-auth
description: Add OAuth 2.1 authorization to MCP servers using Scalekit.

commands.name: setup
commands.description: Print the MCP OAuth setup checklist. Use when starting to add OAuth 2.1 to an MCP server. Accepts optional framework arg: express | fastapi | fastmcp.

commands.name: generate
commands.description: Generate OAuth middleware code for a framework. Use when writing auth code. Requires one arg: express | fastapi | fastmcp.

commands.name: validate
commands.description: Validate an MCP server's OAuth configuration. Use when testing auth setup. Requires one arg: the MCP server base URL.
